title: othonna incisa
intro: Othonna incisa, also known as the 'Daisy chain', is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Othonna incisa include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Othonna incisa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
